editor.rationale: Reviewers support publication but want clarifications on reporting completeness and residual uncertainty.

concerns: Only k=3 of 227 available trials included; heterogeneity and publication-bias diagnostics are underpowered. Justify exclusions or expand eligibility.
RoB 2.0: 0 high-risk + 3 some-concerns domains; add low-RoB sensitivity analysis.
Pooled -0.21 diverges from Mathieu 2023 benchmark (MD -0.05 [-0.14, 0.04]); Discussion should reconcile explicitly.
Effect not translated into absolute-risk difference / NNT for shared decision.
QoL / PROs reported in 1 trial(s) (PRO (generic)) but not in headline pool; consider adding as a secondary analysis rather than omitting.
